title: Pressure distribution over a swept wing
abstract: Measurements describe wing pressure distribution and lift behavior at transonic speed.
text: A wind tunnel study records pressure distribution over a swept wing. The report compares lift, drag, and boundary layer changes as speed approaches Mach one.

title: Boundary layer transition on flat plates
abstract: Experiments examine laminar and turbulent boundary layer transition under changing Reynolds number.
text: The study focuses on boundary layer transition for flat plates and reports skin friction under different flow conditions.

title: Heat transfer in hypersonic flow
abstract: A theoretical treatment of aerodynamic heating over blunt bodies in high speed flow.
text: The paper estimates heat transfer rates in hypersonic flow and compares stagnation point heating models for blunt reentry bodies.

title: Flutter analysis for aircraft panels
abstract: Panel flutter is modeled under aerodynamic loading with structural stiffness constraints.
text: The report derives a flutter boundary for aircraft panels exposed to unsteady aerodynamic loading and variable stiffness.

title: Drag prediction for slender bodies
abstract: Slender body theory is used to estimate drag and pressure forces for aircraft fuselage shapes.
text: The paper compares drag prediction methods for slender bodies and evaluates pressure effects along the body axis.
